data: Group Discussion - Hard Skills vs. Soft Skills
Group Discussion - Hard Skills vs. Soft Skills
Learn how to discuss hard skills and soft skills in a group discussion

message:
Hey! Today we're learning how to discuss Hard Skills vs. Soft Skills in a group discussion.

Using the right structure helps you speak clearly and confidently.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/ac97b412-5884-4fb6-82c6-42597079df71-GD---v2-(1).jpg
button_text: Cool!

message:
When you want to talk about what something offers or contributes, use this structure:

"[Topic] offers [advantage]."

For example: "Hard skills offer technical ability for better job performance."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/ac97b412-5884-4fb6-82c6-42597079df71-GD---v2-(1).jpg
button_text: Got it!

message:
Here's another example.

If someone asks about the benefits of soft skills, you can say:

"Soft skills offer better teamwork and communication in the workplace."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/ac97b412-5884-4fb6-82c6-42597079df71-GD---v2-(1).jpg
button_text: Next!

message:
When you want to mention both the advantage and the drawback, use this structure:

"While [topic] offers [advantage], it also has a [drawback]."

For example: "While hard skills offer technical expertise, it also has a limitation of poor interpersonal skills."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/ac97b412-5884-4fb6-82c6-42597079df71-GD---v2-(1).jpg
button_text: Makes sense!

message:
Let's practice discussing hard skills vs. soft skills!

image_url:
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to talk about what hard skills offer

1.Hard skills offer technical ability for better job performance.
2.Hard skills are not important in today's workplace.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to talk about the drawback of soft skills

1.Soft skills are useless because they cannot be measured.
2.While soft skills offer better communication, it also has a lack of technical knowledge.

Correct answer: 2
While&&hard&&skills offer&&technical&&accuracy, it&&also&&has the&&drawback of&&limited soft&&skill&&development.
While&&soft&&skills offer&&strong&&interpersonal&&skills, it&&also&&has the&&challenge of&&lacking technical&&depth.

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. What does hard skills offer to a job candidate? Use Structure 1.'

'2. While hard skills offer technical ability, what challenge does it also bring? Respond using Structure 2.'

'3. What does soft skills offer to a workplace? Use Structure 1.'

'4. While soft skills offer better teamwork, what risk does it also bring? Give your answer using Structure 2.'

'5. What does having both hard and soft skills offer to a professional? Use Structure 1.'"
